international_shipping_policy: Malidag yakazvipira kushandira vatengi pasi rese nekutumira kwakavimbika kune dzimwe nyika. Isu tinoziva kukosha kwekuwanikwa uye kurerukirwa, ndosaka takavaka network yerogistics inosvika kumakondinendi ese. Kunyangwe iwe uripi, tinoyedza kuona kuti yako yekutenga ruzivo haina musono uye inoshanda. Masevhisi edu epasi rese ekutumira anosvika kuEurope, Africa, Asia, Americas, uye mhiri. Kuburikidza neakavimbika epasirese ekutumira vadyidzani, isu tinokwanisa kupa panguva uye yakachengeteka yekufambisa kwemaodha ako. Yese inotumirwa inotariswa nekuchenjera kuchengetedza chigadzirwa chemhando uye kuve nechokwadi chekugutsikana kwevatengi. KuMalidag, isu tinoona kutumira kune dzimwe nyika sekupfuura sevhisi - ivimbiso. Vimbiso yekuita kuti zvigadzirwa zvedu zviwanikwe kune akasiyana uye ari kukura nharaunda yepasirese. Kunyangwe iwe uri wekutanga shopper kana mutengi ari kudzoka, unogona kutarisira hunyanzvi, kuvimbika, uye kutarisirwa kusingachinji muhurongwa hwese hwatinozadzisa.
shipping_notice: Tiri kuratidza zvigadzirwa zvinotumirwa kunzvimbo yako. Unogona kusarudza imwe nzvimbo mune menyu iri pamusoro.
learn_about_shipping: Dzidza nezvekutumira kune dzimwe nyika pano
login_to_add_to_basket: Ndokumbira upinde kuti uwedzere zvinhu mudengu rako.
basket_add_failed: Tatadza kuwedzera chinhu mudengu. Ndapota edza zvakare.
basket_add_error: Pane mhosho yaitika tichiwedzera chinhu mudengu rako.
not_connected: 🚫 Hauna kubatana. Ita shuwa yekubatanidza kune network inotsigirwa.
unknown_network: ❌ Unknown Network. Wakabatana kunetiweki isina kutsigirwa.
wallet_not_connected_warning: ⚠️ Wallet yako haina kubatana. Ndapota batanidza chikwama chako kutanga.
shipping_fee: PaMalidag, isu tinovavarira kupa pachena uye nemakwikwi ekufambisa emari anoenderana nenzvimbo yako uye chimiro cheodha yako. Mari yekutumira inoverengerwa zvine simba panguva yekubhadhara, uchifunga nezvezvinhu zvakaita sekuenda, nzira yekutumira, huremu hwechinhu, uye saizi yekurongedza.  Isu tinodyidzana nevatakuri vedzimwe nyika dzakawanda kuti tipe akanakisa mareti aripo kune ese akajairwa uye ekutaura sarudzo dzekutumira. Munguva yekutarisa, iwe unokwanisa kuona iyo chaiyo mutengo wekutumira usati wapedza kutenga kwako - hapana muripo wakavanzika kana muripo usingatarisirwe.  Kune maodha akakura kana ayo anopfuura imwe kukosha kwechikumbaridzo, tinogona kupa mahara ekutumira mapromotion, ayo achanyatso kuratidzwa pakubuda. Izvi zvinopihwa zvinogona kusiyana nedunhu uye nenguva yegore.  Kana iwe uine chero mibvunzo nezve mutengo wekutumira kana kukodzera kwekutumira mahara, inzwa wakasununguka kubata timu yedu yekutsigira. Isu tiri pano kuti tikubatsire iwe kuita yakanyanya ruzivo uye inodhura-inoshanda sarudzo yezvaunoda kutumira.

Estimate_delivery_time_paragraph1: PaMalidag, isu tinonzwisisa kuti kuendesa panguva yakakodzera chikamu chakakosha chechiitiko chako chekutenga. Ndosaka tichishanda pamwe chete nevatakuri vepasi rese vanovimbika kuti tive nechokwadi chekuti maodha ako anosvika kwauri zvakachengeteka uye nemazvo, zvisinei kuti uri kupi munyika.
Estimate_delivery_time_paragraph2: Inofungidzirwa nguva dzekutumira dzinosiyana zvichienderana nekwauri kuenda, nzira yekutumira yakasarudzwa pakubuda, uye chero maitiro anoshanda ekubvisa tsika. Nepo isu tichiyedza kuzadzisa nguva dziri pazasi, kunonotsa pano neapo nekuda kwenzvimbo dzeposvo kana mirau yepasi rese inogona kuitika.
standard: Standard Shipping: Kazhinji inounzwa mukati me7 kune 21 bhizinesi mazuva , zvichienderana nenzvimbo uye yeposvo sevhisi mamiriro.
express: Express Shipping: Inosvika mukati me3 kusvika ku7 mazuva ebhizinesi kune mazhinji ekuenda kune dzimwe nyika kuburikidza nevatakuri vekutanga.
Estimate_delivery_time_paragraph3: Iwe unogashira nhamba yekutevera nekukurumidza kana yako odha yatumirwa, kuti iwe ugone kutarisa rwendo rwayo munguva chaiyo. Kana pasuru yako ikanonoka kupfuura hwindo rinofungidzirwa, timu yedu yekutsigira inogara iripo kuti ikubatsire kugadzirisa nyaya nekukurumidza.
Estimate_delivery_time_paragraph4: Ndapota cherechedza kuti mazororo, kuongorora tsika, kana nzvimbo dziri kure dzekutumira dzinogona kuwedzera imwe nguva. Isu tinokurudzira kusarudza kutumira kwekutumira kune maodha anobata nguva.
Shipping_Fees_paragraph1: PaMalidag, isu tinovavarira kupa pachena uye nemakwikwi ekufambisa emari anoenderana nenzvimbo yako uye chimiro cheodha yako. Mari yekutumira inoverengerwa zvine simba panguva yekubhadhara, uchifunga nezvezvinhu zvakaita sekuenda, nzira yekutumira, huremu hwechinhu, uye saizi yekurongedza.
Shipping_Fees_paragraph2: Isu tinodyidzana nevatakuri vedzimwe nyika dzakawanda kuti tipe akanakisa mareti aripo kune ese akajairwa uye ekutaura sarudzo dzekutumira. Panguva yekutarisa, iwe unokwanisa kuona iyo chaiyo mutengo wekutumira usati wapedza kutenga kwako - hapana muripo wakavanzika kana muripo usingatarisirwe.
Shipping_Fees_paragraph3: Kune maodha akakura kana ayo anopfuura imwe kukosha kwechikumbaridzo, tinogona kupa mahara ekutumira kushambadza , izvo zvichanyatso kuratidzwa pakubuda. Izvi zvinopihwa zvinogona kusiyana nedunhu uye nenguva yegore.
Shipping_Fees_paragraph4: Kana iwe uine chero mibvunzo nezve mutengo wekutumira kana kukodzera kwekutumira mahara, inzwa wakasununguka kubata timu yedu yekutsigira. Isu tiri pano kuti tikubatsire iwe kuita yakanyanya ruzivo uye inodhura-inoshanda sarudzo yezvaunoda kutumira.
Customs_Duties_Taxes_paragraph1: Tapota cherechedza kuti maodha epasi rose anogona kunge ari pasi pemitero yemitero, mutero wekunze kwenyika, uye mimwe miripo inotemerwa nehurumende yemuno. Iyi miripo haina kuisirwa muchigadzirwa kana mitengo yekutumira inoratidzwa paMalidag uye inogona kutorwa neveko veko tsika chiremera pakutumira.
Customs_Duties_Taxes_paragraph2: Semunhu anogamuchira, iwe ndiwe wega une basa rekuona kuteererwa kwemitemo yenyika yako yekupinza uye yekubhadhara chero mari inodiwa. Isu tinokurudzira kutarisa nehofisi yetsika yenyika yako kuti uwane mamwe mashoko usati waisa odha yako.
Customs_Duties_Taxes_paragraph3: Malidag haina mhosva yekuwedzera mari, kunonoka kwetsika, kana kuramba mapakeji nekuda kwekusabhadharwa kwemitero yekunze kana nyaya dzine chekuita nemutero. Kana pakaitika pasuru inodzoserwa nekuda kwetsika kusabhadhara kana kusateedzera, chero kudzoka kwekutumira kana kudzoreredza mari inobviswa kubva kumari yako.
Customs_Duties_Taxes_paragraph4: Isu tinoyedza kuita kuti ruzivo rwako rwekutenga kune dzimwe nyika ruve rwakatsetseka sezvinobvira uye tiri pano kuti tikubatsire nemibvunzo ine chekuita netsika kana zvinyorwa. Ndokumbira usazeze kubata timu yedu yekutsigira usati watenga kana mushure mekutenga kwako.
language_change_body_1: Nekuchinja mutauro, zvikamu zvese zveapp zvinosanganisira mazita echigadzirwa, wongororo, uye zvirimo zvicharatidzwa mumutauro wakasarudzwa.
language_change_body_3: Kana usina kupinda, sarudzo yako haizoyeukwi.
language_change_body_4: Ndokumbira upinde mukati kuti uve nechokwadi chekuti zvaunofarira mumutauro wachengetwa mumasesheni ese.
important_ reminder: Ongorora mhando dzedu dzakanakisisa uye chitoro nemhando
